sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108082" key="*(upnotra/pezos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ὑπνοτράπεζος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n108082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Table-sleeper,</tr_> name of a parasite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
